title: Aureline merge / conflict-class taxonomy vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the merge / conflict-class taxonomy frozen in docs/vcs/merge_and_conflict_contract.md. One conflict_class_record pins the closed identity of one conflict class (conflict_class_value drawn from the closed seven-value vocabulary covering plain text, structured config, lockfile / dependency manifest regenerate-first, generated-or-derived-source regenerate-first, binary or unmergeable choose-source-only, notebook cell-aware merge, and evidence-immutable no-merge), the default resolution surface every Aureline merge surface renders for that class, the source-of-truth authority that pins which side is canonical, the unknown-key preservation expectation, the unresolved-count navigation posture, the regenerate-first requirement, the abandon / reopen safety posture, the explicit fallback-to-text posture so structured and generated conflicts cannot silently degrade into lossy text merges, and the review-artifact-class refs the conflict class binds to. One audit stream (conflict_class) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. Local Git / structured artifact / generator-input / notebook self truth is authoritative; raw text fallback is forbidden silently and admissible only with an explicit lossy acknowledgement on classes that admit it. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw notebook output bytes, raw generator argv, raw secrets, and raw lockfile / SBOM bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / lifecycle state only. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, conflict_class_value, resolution_surface_class, source_of_truth_authority_class, fallback_to_text_class, unknown_key_preservation_class, unresolved_count_navigation_class, abandon_reopen_safety_class, regenerate_first_required_class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps conflict_class_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

conflict_class_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the conflict-class vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw notebook output bytes, raw generator argv, raw secrets, and raw lockfile / SBOM bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload. Exporters MUST apply broker-owned redaction (ADR-0007) before the value crosses this boundary.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 / ADR-0018 trust state are re-validated on every restore and topology-changing mutation.

review_artifact_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/review/review_surface_record.schema.json with the line_oriented_source_artifact token added so plain source files have a stable handle on this taxonomy. The conflict-class row pairs each conflict_class_value with the review-artifact classes that bind to it through review_artifact_class_refs.

conflict_class_value.description: Frozen conflict-class taxonomy. plain_text_line_oriented_merge covers source files reviewed line-by-line. structured_config_key_aware_merge covers JSON / YAML / TOML configs whose canonical source is the structured text itself. lockfile_or_dependency_manifest_regenerate_first covers resolved lockfiles whose conflict resolution flows through regenerating from the manifest. generated_or_derived_source_regenerate_first covers generated source / source maps / SBOMs whose conflict resolution flows through regeneration from canonical inputs. binary_or_unmergeable_choose_source_only covers images / design snapshots / opaque payloads where byte merge is forbidden. notebook_cell_aware_merge covers .ipynb notebooks where cell identity, metadata filters, and output handling presets govern resolution. evidence_immutable_no_merge covers support bundles / release-evidence / contract-gate evidence packets which admit no resolution action.

resolution_surface_class.description: Frozen resolution-surface vocabulary. inline_three_way_merge_view renders base / current / incoming / result for plain text. structure_aware_merge_view_with_unknown_key_preservation renders key-aware compare and edit for structured configs. regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned routes lockfile / generated-source conflicts through regeneration with the canonical input pinned. choose_source_only_no_byte_merge renders binary or opaque payload conflicts as a choose-current / choose-incoming surface only. cell_aware_merge_view renders notebook cell-by-cell compare with metadata-filter and output-handling presets. external_tool_handoff_with_round_trip_required hands the conflict to an external tool and forbids merge-complete admission until a verified round-trip artifact returns. evidence_reader_no_resolution_admissible disables every resolution action and offers only a read-only viewer.

source_of_truth_authority_class.description: Frozen source-of-truth authority vocabulary. local_branch_authoritative_for_text pairs with plain_text_line_oriented_merge. structured_artifact_self_canonical pairs with structured_config_key_aware_merge. manifest_canonical_lockfile_regenerated pairs with lockfile_or_dependency_manifest_regenerate_first. generator_input_canonical_artifact_regenerated pairs with generated_or_derived_source_regenerate_first. binary_payload_one_of_two_authoritative_choose_source pairs with binary_or_unmergeable_choose_source_only. notebook_self_canonical_cell_identity_required pairs with notebook_cell_aware_merge. evidence_packet_immutable_authoritative_no_merge pairs with evidence_immutable_no_merge.

fallback_to_text_class.description: Frozen fallback-to-text vocabulary. no_fallback_admitted_native_surface_only is the default for non-text classes whose native surface is mandatory. raw_text_fallback_explicit_user_acknowledged_lossy admits a raw-text view as a last-resort only after the user acknowledges the loss in writing on the audit stream (currently admissible only on structured_config_key_aware_merge). raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class denies raw text fallback unconditionally for binary, evidence, and regenerate-first classes; structured-or-generated conflicts that try to render a silent text merge deny with structured_or_generated_silent_text_merge_forbidden.

unknown_key_preservation_class.description: Frozen unknown-key preservation vocabulary. required_round_trip_preservation requires the resolution surface to round-trip unknown / vendor keys through every accept / merge-complete action; structured configs and notebooks default here. recommended_with_warning_on_drop emits a validation hint when an unknown key is about to be dropped (lockfiles / SBOMs). not_applicable_no_user_authored_metadata covers binary payloads and evidence packets.

unresolved_count_navigation_class.description: Frozen unresolved-count navigation vocabulary. count_required_with_next_unresolved_navigation pairs with inline_three_way_merge_view (line-oriented unresolved hunk count and a 'jump to next unresolved' affordance). count_required_with_next_cell_or_section_navigation pairs with structured / cell-aware surfaces (unresolved key or cell count plus 'next unresolved key / cell' navigation). count_not_applicable_choose_source_only pairs with choose-source-only. count_not_applicable_regenerate_first pairs with regenerate-first surfaces (the unresolved set is a single regenerate decision rather than a hunk count). count_not_applicable_evidence_immutable pairs with evidence-immutable rows.

regenerate_first_required_class.description: Frozen regenerate-first vocabulary. regenerate_first_not_required covers plain text and structured config rows whose resolution does not flow through regeneration. regenerate_first_required_canonical_input_pinned requires the resolution session to cite a canonical input ref before any merge-complete admission (lockfiles / generated source). regenerate_first_required_external_tool_handoff requires the resolution session to route through an external tool and resolve a verified round-trip artifact ref before merge-complete admission.

abandon_reopen_safety_class.description: Frozen abandon / reopen safety vocabulary. abandon_rolls_back_to_recovery_object_reopen_admissible is the default for plain text, structured config, lockfile, generated, and notebook classes — abandon rolls back to the recovery object the session pinned at admission and reopen reattaches to the same conflict class. abandon_blocked_pending_user_review is set when an in-progress action class is irreversible without an explicit user review. abandon_with_lossy_state_export_required_before_reopen forces an export of the in-progress lossy state before reopen is admissible (binary / evidence rows that admitted partial choose-source operations).

conflict_class_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the conflict_class audit stream.

conflict_class_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the conflict_class stream. conflict_class_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a conflict_class_denial_reason.

conflict_class_id.description: Opaque id naming this conflict-class row across merge / resolution / Git-provider / support-export / AI-review / release-evidence surfaces.

review_artifact_class_refs.description: Closed list of review-artifact classes this conflict class binds to. Always non-empty so every row resolves to at least one structured-artifact review surface (denies with review_artifact_class_refs_required_non_empty).

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when the conflict-class row has been archived. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: plain_text_line_oriented_merge MUST cite inline_three_way_merge_view, local_branch_authoritative_for_text, count_required_with_next_unresolved_navigation, and regenerate_first_not_required.

structured_config_key_aware_merge MUST cite structure_aware_merge_view_with_unknown_key_preservation, structured_artifact_self_canonical, required_round_trip_preservation, count_required_with_next_cell_or_section_navigation, and regenerate_first_not_required.

lockfile_or_dependency_manifest_regenerate_first MUST cite regenerate_first_with_canonical_input_pinned, manifest_canonical_lockfile_regenerated, count_not_applicable_regenerate_first, regenerate_first_required_canonical_input_pinned, and a fallback class that does NOT admit silent raw-text merge (raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class).

binary_or_unmergeable_choose_source_only MUST cite choose_source_only_no_byte_merge, binary_payload_one_of_two_authoritative_choose_source, count_not_applicable_choose_source_only, regenerate_first_not_required, raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class, and not_applicable_no_user_authored_metadata. binary byte-level merge denies with binary_or_unmergeable_class_forbids_byte_merge.

notebook_cell_aware_merge MUST cite cell_aware_merge_view, notebook_self_canonical_cell_identity_required, required_round_trip_preservation, count_required_with_next_cell_or_section_navigation, and regenerate_first_not_required. notebook rows that lose cell identity deny with notebook_cell_identity_required_for_cell_aware_merge.

evidence_immutable_no_merge MUST cite evidence_reader_no_resolution_admissible, evidence_packet_immutable_authoritative_no_merge, count_not_applicable_evidence_immutable, regenerate_first_not_required, raw_text_fallback_forbidden_for_class, not_applicable_no_user_authored_metadata, and abandon_blocked_pending_user_review. resolution actions on this class deny with evidence_immutable_class_forbids_resolution_action.

conflict_class_record.description: Row shape consumed by the merge / resolution surface, the change-stack panel, the source-control panel, the AI branch-agent panel, the support / export bundle, and the audit lane. Exactly one row per conflict_class_value.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when conflict_class_audit_event_id_value is conflict_class_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is conflict_class_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

conflict_class_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the conflict_class stream.
